title: The First Step: Forge Your Purpose
description: A guild initiation and self-forging rite where new members traverse four halls, define their motivation, and forge a hidden archetype profile.
openingSituation: You stand at the Compass Dais of the Wyked Samurai Guild. Four halls call you to the rite. Complete each hall in any order, return to the hub, and seal your purpose.

compass_dais.name: Compass Dais
compass_dais.description: The guild’s central hub where your initiation path is chosen and your final vow is spoken.

hall_memory.name: Hall of Origins
hall_memory.description: Trace the first forge-marks that still shape who you are.

hall_ambition.name: Hall of Aspiration
hall_ambition.description: Name the future you pursue with sharpened intent.

hall_burden.name: Hall of Weight
hall_burden.description: Face the weight you carry and choose how to bear it.

hall_connection.name: Hall of Bonds
hall_connection.description: Honor the ties that call you forward.

hall_ambition.question: What future are you willing to pursue with your whole will?

hall_burden.question: What burden still rides with you?

hall_connection.question: Whom do you carry in your purpose?

final.question: Name the purpose you swear to the guild.
options: To become someone my younger self would trust.
To build a life that lifts others higher.
To turn my pain into purpose.
